Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Continued To Dec-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joel Blackman for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Blackman requested a continuance stating that he needed to make some corrections to the accounting. The matter was continued to December 2, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Patrick Heard, CSR #11055. Clerk: R. Noguera/ J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy M. Mendoza.

Second And Final Account Of The Max And Margarete Kaufmann Trust
Off Calendar Oct-07-2008 Continued To Nov-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joel Blackman for the San Francisco Public Guardian.

Mr. Blackman requested a continuance stating that he was missing the statement for the brokerage account. The matter was continued to November 18, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Carl Sauceda, CSR#2031. Clerk: R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
